items.name: Enterprise migration factory automation
items.description: Automate assessment, dependency mapping, landing-zone checks, migration waves, and cutover readiness.
planningAssumptions: Use existing public-cloud product-brick ownership boundaries.
Validate adoption with customer discovery before scaling implementation.
Measure both customer outcome and business/operating outcome.
risks: Service complexity may increase cognitive load if paths are not opinionated.
Capacity, security, or cost constraints may slow adoption if surfaced too late.
